javascript closures: A closure is when a function remembers variables from its outer scope even after the outer function has finished executing.
javascript event loop: The JavaScript event loop handles asynchronous callbacks using a call stack, callback queue, and microtask queue.
javascript promises: Promises represent asynchronous operations. States: pending, fulfilled, rejected.
javascript async await: async/await simplifies promises. Example: const data = await fetch(url).then(r=>r.json());
javascript fetch: Fetch is used for HTTP requests. Example: fetch('/api').then(r=>r.json()).then(data=>console.log(data));
javascript array methods: Common methods include map, filter, reduce, find, some, every, and forEach.
javascript classes: Classes define blueprints for objects. Example: class Car { constructor(name){ this.name=name } }
javascript modules: Modules use import/export. Example: export function add(a,b){ return a+b }
python decorators: Decorators wrap functions to modify behavior. Example: @login_required
python generators: Generators yield values lazily using the yield keyword.
python async: Async Python uses async def and await with event loops.
python list comprehension: List comprehensions provide concise loops: [x*x for x in range(10)]
python flask: Flask is a lightweight Python web framework.
python django: Django is a full-stack Python web framework.
c++ pointers: Pointers store memory addresses. Example: int* p = &x;
c++ references: References are aliases for variables using &.
c++ stl: The Standard Template Library includes vector, map, set, and algorithms.
c++ smart pointers: unique_ptr and shared_ptr manage memory automatically.
java streams: Streams process collections with functional operations like map, filter, reduce.
java concurrency: Java concurrency uses threads, executors, and synchronized blocks.
java spring boot: Spring Boot simplifies Java web services and APIs.
html semantic tags: Semantic tags improve accessibility: header, nav, main, article, footer.
css flexbox: Flexbox aligns items in rows or columns. Example: display:flex;
css grid: Grid layouts use rows and columns with grid-template.
css animations: CSS animations use @keyframes and animation properties.
sql joins: SQL joins combine rows from multiple tables. Types: INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL.
sql transactions: Transactions ensure ACID properties in databases.
rest api: REST APIs use HTTP methods GET POST PUT DELETE and JSON responses.
graphql: GraphQL allows clients to request exactly the data they need.
websockets: WebSockets allow real-time communication between client and server.
ci cd: CI/CD automates build, test, and deployment pipelines.
algorithms sorting: Common sorts include quicksort, mergesort, heapsort, and bubble sort.
binary search: Binary search works on sorted arrays with O(log n) complexity.
hash tables: Hash tables map keys to values using hash functions.
example javascript project: Example JavaScript project generated by Dolores.
example python project: Example Python project generated by Dolores.

files.index.html: Todo App

debug javascript undefined: A variable may not be declared. Check let/const scope.
debug cors: Enable CORS headers or use a proxy server.
debug python indentation: Python requires consistent indentation using spaces.
debug memory leak: Ensure unused references are cleared and objects are garbage collected.
math calculus: Calculus studies change using derivatives and integrals.
math linear algebra: Linear algebra deals with vectors, matrices, and transformations.
physics relativity: Einstein's relativity describes space-time and gravity.
physics quantum: Quantum mechanics studies particles at atomic scales.
chemistry periodic table: The periodic table organizes elements by atomic number.
history world war 2: World War II occurred from 1939 to 1945 involving most global nations.
finance investing: Investing grows wealth using stocks, bonds, ETFs, and real estate.
finance compound interest: Compound interest earns interest on both principal and previous interest.
tech ai: Artificial intelligence allows machines to perform tasks requiring human intelligence.
tech blockchain: Blockchain is a distributed ledger technology used in cryptocurrencies.
tech quantum computing: Quantum computers use qubits to perform certain computations faster.
